meta.title: Create an AI Assistant or Endpoint for your Documents
meta.description:
Key "how-to" videos:
➡️ BM25 and Similiarity Retrieval Video: https://youtu.be/9QJXvNiJIG8
➡️ Citation Verification Video: https://youtu.be/-wGzSnhQKPM

OTHER TRELIS LINKS:
➡️ Trelis Newsletter: https://blog.Trelis.com
➡️ Trelis Resources and Support: https://Trelis.com/About
➡️ Trelis Endpoints: The hosted service has been discontinued. Reach out via a consulting inquiry on Trelis.com if you would like support for deployment.

Credit Rohan Sharma for help building Trelis Endpoints as part of the Trelis Internships program (find out more at Trelis.com/internships).

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Upload docs, get an OpenAI-style endpoint
0:21 Trelis Endpoints Demo
1:53 How we built this!
